description: Extracts reviewer comments from annotated documents, resolves comment context, applies dispositions, and produces a canonical comment resolution matrix. Supports the full comment lifecycle from extraction through final disposition.
forbidden_responsibilities: Defining artifact models or envelope schemas — those are owned by shared.artifact_models
Defining identifier schemes — those are owned by shared.ids
Meeting minutes processing — that belongs to workflow_modules.meeting_intelligence
Domain-specific regulatory reasoning — that belongs to domain_modules
Work item creation and lifecycle tracking — that belongs to control_plane.work_items
